CustomField.formula:
(Active_Baseline__r.SHEP_Grant_Total__c +
IF(ISPICKVAL(Version_Status__c,'Draft'), IF(ISBLANK( Previous_Version__c ), SHEP_Grant_Total__c, IF(ISBLANK( Previous_Version__r.SHEP_Grant_Total__c ),SHEP_Grant_Total__c , SHEP_Grant_Total__c - Previous_Version__r.SHEP_Grant_Total__c)) , SHEP_Grant_Total__c) )
/
(Active_Baseline__r.SHEP_House_Count__c +
IF(ISPICKVAL(Version_Status__c,'Draft'), IF(ISBLANK( Previous_Version__c ), SHEP_House_Count__c, IF(ISBLANK( Previous_Version__r.SHEP_House_Count__c ),SHEP_House_Count__c , SHEP_House_Count__c - Previous_Version__r.SHEP_House_Count__c)) , SHEP_House_Count__c) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Average grant spend of energy performance pot per social home for all approved homes to date + current batch
CustomField.label: Grant Per House All Approved SHEP
